channel.title: Ramona Gloria | Bridging Design & Development
channel.description: Recent content on Ramona Gloria | Bridging Design & Development

item.title: My Web App 2
item.description: A brief description of what this project does.

item.title: Project Proposal
item.description: This project proposal is a plan for a potential business, “Arctic Treats” official website, designed to capture the brand’s vibrant energy. It features a full flavor menu, operational details like business hours and locations, and direct contact information to create a seamless experience for local customers.
